mnemonics: Roses Are Red, Scope Is Key
Reduce Import Daily - Every Single Time
keyPoints: The reduction clause is used to specify the operation to be performed on the variables.
The scope of a variable determines its lifetime and accessibility in a shared-memory program.
Loop carried dependency is a concept in parallel programming that can be used to optimize the scheduling of loops.
Scheduling is the process of allocating time slices to tasks in a parallel program.
Producers and consumers are two types of tasks in parallel programming.
Caches are small, fast memory locations that store frequently accessed data.
Cache coherence is the ability of a cache to provide consistent data to all processors in a system.
False sharing is a type of data contention that can occur in parallel programming.
